coaster_cc_kidcoaster_desc.source: A steel coaster that's white-knuckle fun for kids and grown-ups alike.
coaster_cc_kidcoaster_desc.translation: A steel coaster that's white-knuckle fun for kids and grown-ups alike.

coaster_cc_newgeninvertingsuspended_desc.source: Experience silky-smooth inversions on this twisting suspended coaster.
coaster_cc_newgeninvertingsuspended_desc.translation: Experience silky-smooth inversions on this twisting suspended coaster.

fr_airdrop_desc.source: Let this ride lift you up and drop you down like a towering yo-yo!
fr_airdrop_desc.translation: Let this ride lift you up and drop you down like a towering yo-yo!

fr_highroll_desc.source: This ride's spinning gondolas rotate on a raised arm to take your guests on an all-around orbit!
fr_highroll_desc.translation: This ride's spinning gondolas rotate on a raised arm to take your guests on an all-around orbit!

fr_wavesim_desc.source: Break out the board and carve up gnarly waves on this rip-roaring surfing simulator!
fr_wavesim_desc.translation: Break out the board and carve up gnarly waves on this rip-roaring surfing simulator!

fr_wavesim_descalt.source: Put on a swimsuit, break out the board and carve up gnarly waves on this rip-roaring surfing simulator!
fr_wavesim_descalt.translation: Put on a swimsuit, break out the board and carve up gnarly waves on this rip-roaring surfing simulator!

infopanel_flatride_needsswimsuit.source: Guests must be in a swimsuit to use this ride.
infopanel_flatride_needsswimsuit.translation: Guests must be in a swimsuit to use this ride.

infopanel_flatride_needsswimsuitwarning.source: Guests must be in a swimsuit to use this ride. Ensure Guests have access to a Changing Room.
infopanel_flatride_needsswimsuitwarning.translation: Guests must be in a swimsuit to use this ride. Ensure Guests have access to a Changing Room.
